name: HR administrators in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month tool
description: For HR administrators in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month, manual tracking causes payroll errors. We automate time off requests and payroll adjustments instead of manual tracking and adjustments via spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR administrators in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 payroll adjustments/month
problem_solved: Managing employee time off requests and payroll adjustments manually is time-consuming and error-prone.
features: Notification system for HR and payroll administrators
